languages.text: Ловушка сооружена так, чтобы жертва страдала, но оставалась жива. Это явно конструкция друкари.

traits.locale_text: Ловушка сооружена так, чтобы жертва страдала, но оставалась жива. Это явно конструкция друкари.

languages.text: The trap is built to ensure the victim experiences pain while staying alive. It is obviously a Drukhari contraption.
languages.original_text: Ловушка сооружена так, чтобы жертва страдала, но оставалась жива. Это явно конструкция друкари.

The trap is built to ensure the victim experiences pain while staying alive. It is obviously a Drukhari contraption.

languages.text: Die Falle ist so gebaut, dass das Opfer Schmerzen erleidet, aber am Leben bleibt. Es handelt sich offensichtlich um eine Drukhari-Vorrichtung.
languages.original_text: The trap is built to ensure the victim experiences pain while staying alive. It is obviously a Drukhari contraption.

languages.text: Le piège est construit de manière à ce que la victime souffre tout en restant en vie. Il s'agit manifestement d'un engin de Drukhari.
languages.original_text: The trap is built to ensure the victim experiences pain while staying alive. It is obviously a Drukhari contraption.

languages.text: 这个陷阱的目的是确保受害者在经历痛苦的同时还能活命。这显然是德鲁哈里人的装置。
languages.original_text: The trap is built to ensure the victim experiences pain while staying alive. It is obviously a Drukhari contraption.

languages.text: La trampa está construida para asegurar que la víctima experimente dolor mientras permanece con vida. Obviamente es un artilugio Drukhari.
languages.original_text: The trap is built to ensure the victim experiences pain while staying alive. It is obviously a Drukhari contraption.

languages.text: この罠は、被害者が生きている間に痛みを経験するように作られている。明らかにドルハリの仕掛けである。
languages.original_text: The trap is built to ensure the victim experiences pain while staying alive. It is obviously a Drukhari contraption.

languages.text: Tuzak, kurbanın hayatta kalırken acı çekmesini sağlamak için inşa edilmiştir. Belli ki bir Drukhari mekanizması.
languages.original_text: The trap is built to ensure the victim experiences pain while staying alive. It is obviously a Drukhari contraption.
